testcase.name: GR001

failure.message:
element click intercepted: Element
...
is not clickable at point (976, 30). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.178) Build info: version: '4.24.0', revision: '748ffc9bc3' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [d9ac0829703272995ff1b395771cec8f, clickElement {id=f.E1FE507435963ACA69B9162E3D64E61E.d.35961E400875393384D30A37BE60B331.e.24}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.178, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.165 (4b989da09e1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\User\AppData\Local...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:53400}, goog:processID: 64336, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:53400/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.178, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (d9ac0829703272995ff1b395771cec8f)] -> xpath: //div[text()='User Management']] Session ID: d9ac0829703272995ff1b395771cec8f

Apr 06, 2026 5:09:27 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Apr 06, 2026 5:09:27 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.178. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.24.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.24.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: GR002
testcase.system-err: Apr 06, 2026 5:10:06 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Apr 06, 2026 5:10:06 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.178. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.24.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
